_meta.doktryna: EDYTUJ PRAWDE + INTENCJA+REFY+ZAKAZY + pre-neutralizacja refow (cropy narzedzi z packshotu; badge/insety usuniete) + kotwica tla w KAZDYM prompcie + BEZ sprzezenia plikow petli (lekcja lampki: echo kompozycja, nie plik). NOWOSC: kref element PER SCENA (kazda scena sledzi inne narzedzie zestawu).
_meta.kanon_kata: hands-POV z pozycji kierowcy/pasazera; narzedzie duze w kadrze (>=45%); deska/konsola jako scena; slonce z boku; total szerszy na koniec
_meta.engine_mix: hook/nawiewy/szczeliny/rekawica/total = kref (element = crop narzedzia sceny) · cta = FLF (odlozenie + zip torby); klatki nano z cropow; VO Aria; muzyka+ambient+SFX Stable Audio
_meta.wybor_wzorca: WZORZEC-SCORE: 12+ kandydatow. #1 jade 66,4 (7,2M @ 34k followers vr=1.0! saves 30k) - pelne dane, rytual-schemat. #2 Val 12M / #3 Anna 4,8M (brak followers = vr neutralne). BUG ZNALEZIONY: duplikat video jade (#6, inny author-URL) nie wykryty jako twin - klucz twins musi byc ID video, nie URL (do poprawy w wzorzec_score). Os B: produkty wzorca ROZOWE i INNE (odkurzacz/slime) -> mapujemy schemat rytualu na NASZE niebieskie szczotki; zero scen piany (ryzyko renderow ominiete). Os C: hook satisfying-sweep w sloncu, product-clarity przez narzedzie-w-akcji + torba. WYBOR: jade.

wzorzec.hook_type: in-medias-res rytual ('me every week because I need a clean car') - kolejne zakamarki, satisfying; u nas: duster-sweep w sloncu od klatki 1 + VO rytualu
wzorzec.audio_character: trending/luzny vibe; u nas: VO-story PL (rytual first-person) + SFX diegetyczne (szelest szenilu, szczotkowanie lameli, zip torby) + lekki groove

on_screen_text.text: me every week because I need a clean car

loop.jak: u nas: cta zapina torbe 'do nastepnego tygodnia' -> hook znow wyciaga narzedzie = petla rytualu TYGODNIOWEGO (echo kompozycja torby, BEZ wspolnych plikow klatek)

wzorzec.reaction_sound: brak; u nas satysfakcjonujacy ZIP zamka na koncu
wzorzec.comment_driver: 'co to za zestaw? czy jest cos do nawiewow?' - adresujemy scena vent cleanera + torba-total (widac bogactwo zestawu)

sceny.rola: HOOK - duster sunie po desce w sloncu (satisfying #1)
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Hands-POV inside a modern car: a woman's hand in a light grey casual sleeve holds the blue chenille dashboard duster from the reference image mid-sweep on the black dashboard, dense blue microfiber fringes pressed slightly against the surface; warm afternoon sunlight streams through the windshield, tiny dust motes visible in the light beam; the black zip bag with blue trim sits on the passenger seat in the background; car screens are off/blurred. Photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look, natural skin texture.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The hand sweeps the blue chenille duster smoothly along the dashboard in one satisfying stroke, the fringes glide and flex against the surface, fine dust motes swirl up into the sunbeam; the duster stays EXACTLY the tool from the reference image - black curved handle, dense blue chenille head. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The car interior, bag and light stay exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: hands-POV na deske; duster >=45% szerokosci kadru
kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: duster suwany PLASKO po desce rozdzielczej
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: glowka dustera przylega do powierzchni deski (jak pr_kierownica: narzedzie NA powierzchni)
must_show: niebieski szenil w kontakcie z deska

sceny.rola: FEATURE - vent cleaner w lamelach (nasz slime-moment)
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Close-up hands-POV: the woman's hand holds the blue plastic vent-cleaning tongs from the reference image, their two microfiber-covered arms inserted INTO the horizontal slats of a black car air vent, mid-wipe; dashboard details around, warm side sunlight. The tool is EXACTLY the one from the reference image - blue tongs with microfiber sleeves. Photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look, natural skin.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The hand slides the blue vent-cleaning tongs steadily along the vent slats, the microfiber arms hugging both sides of a slat as they travel; the tool stays EXACTLY the one from the reference image, the vent grille stays rigid and undistorted. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The interior and light stay exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: ramiona szczypiec obejmuja lamele i suna wzdluz
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: ramiona W lamelach nawiewu (jak pr_nawiew.png, ale dlon BEZ zoltej rekawiczki!)

sceny._cut: tnij w trakcie przesuwu wzdluz lameli

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Macro hands-POV: the woman's hand holds the long black detailing brush from the reference image at an angle, its soft black bristle tuft sweeping the narrow seam between the center console and the gear selector trim; buttons nearby blurred, warm sunlight from the side. The brush is EXACTLY the one from the reference image - long slim black handle, dense soft black bristles. Photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone macro look.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The hand flicks the soft black bristles along the console seam in short precise strokes, bristles flexing into the gap, tiny dust lifting; the brush stays EXACTLY the tool from the reference image. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The console and light stay exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.placement: snop wlosia W szczelinie/na krawedzi konsoli

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Hands-POV from the driver seat: the woman's hand wears the blue chenille microfiber mitt from the reference image, resting mid-wipe on the upper rim of the black steering wheel; dashboard behind softly lit by warm sunlight; the black zip bag visible on the passenger seat. The mitt is EXACTLY the one from the reference image - dense blue chenille fingers with a cuff. Photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look, natural skin.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The mitt-covered hand wipes smoothly around the steering wheel rim, chenille strands flexing against it, then gives the wheel a satisfied final pat; the mitt stays EXACTLY the one from the reference image. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The interior and light stay exactly as in the start frame.

sfx.cue: miekki szelest mikrofibry po skorze kierownicy

kontrakt_produktowy.placement: dlon W rekawicy NA obreczy kierownicy (jak pr_kierownica.png)

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Wider interior shot: the clean modern car cabin glowing in warm afternoon sun - spotless black dashboard, clean console; on the passenger seat lies the OPEN black zip bag with blue trim from the reference image with several blue tools neatly inside (chenille duster, mitt, brushes visible); no person in frame. Photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. Slow gentle push-in toward the open tool bag on the seat, sunlight shimmering on the clean dashboard, dust-free air; the bag and tools stay EXACTLY as in the reference image, nothing moves except the subtle camera drift.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: szerszy kadr kabiny; torba z zestawem wyrazna
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: torba otwarta na fotelu pasazera; narzedzia niebieskie w srodku

sceny.rola: CTA / LOOP - duster do torby, zip, do nastepnego tygodnia
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: (cta_first, nano z zestaw_clean2+duster) Close shot of the open black zip bag with blue trim on the passenger seat, blue tools inside; the woman's hand lowers the blue chenille duster INTO the bag, warm sunlight. Tools EXACTLY as in the reference images.
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: (cta_last, nano-CHAIN z cta_first) IDENTYCZNY kadr; zmien TYLKO: duster juz schowany w torbie, torba ZAPIETA (zamek domkniety), dlon spoczywa na torbie. ECHO kompozycji hooka (torba na fotelu) - bez wspolnych plikow.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The hand places the blue duster into the bag, then pulls the zip closed along its track in one satisfying motion and rests on the bag; the bag and tools stay EXACTLY as in the reference images; the zip follows its physical track. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The car interior and light stay exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: close na torbe na fotelu + dlon
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: torba na fotelu pasazera; duster wklada sie glowka w dol

sceny._cut: OSTATNIA klatka = zapieta torba na fotelu (echo KOMPOZYCJI hooka, gdzie torba lezy w tle) - petla rytualu tygodniowego

loop_close.first_frame_echo: echo KOMPOZYCJA (nie plik - lekcja lampki): cta konczy zapieta torba na fotelu; hook otwiera sie z ta sama torba w tle i narzedziem juz w dloni - rytual startuje od nowa
loop_close.audio_continuity: muzyka przez granice petli bez fade; zip na koncu = rym do szelestu dustera na starcie
loop_close.closing_line_setup: 'Do następnego tygodnia.' ustawia 'Co tydzień ten sam rytuał.'

audio.music_brief: clean upbeat feel-good groove with a steady beat from the very first second, light funky bass, crisp percussion, satisfying-cleaning vibe, constant energy until the very end, no outro, no fade out, NO lo-fi, NO ambient (seconds_total=25)

ambient_bed.opis: quiet parked car interior room tone at midday, faint distant street sounds through closed windows, steady and seamless, NO melody, NO music (20 s)

audio._sfx_regula: kazde widoczne zdarzenie = foley-hit (require_sfx); SFX Stable Audio 10 s + trim

consistency.produkt: narzedzie per scena wg cropu-refu (duster/vent/pedzel/rekawica); torba czarno-niebieska ta sama w hook/rekawica/total/cta; kolory niebiesko-czarne (VERBATIM z KARTY)
consistency.rekwizyty: ta sama kabina (czarna deska, konsola, jasny sufit), slonce z boku przez wszystkie sceny; torba na fotelu pasazera
consistency.stany: hook sweep -> nawiewy -> szczeliny -> rekawica -> total (czysto, torba otwarta) -> cta (duster do torby, zip). Kurz TYLKO w hooku (potem czysto - progres rytualu)
